heading: Jurisdiction and applicability of chapter
label: 3912 Jurisdiction and applicability of chapter
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 512 of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.

children.text: each of the States, including the political subdivisions thereof; and
all territory subject to the jurisdiction of the United States.

children.heading: Applicability to proceedings
children.label: b Applicability to proceedings
children.text: This chapter applies to any judicial or administrative proceeding commenced in any court or agency in any jurisdiction subject to this chapter. This chapter does not apply to criminal proceedings.

children.heading: Court in which application may be made
children.label: c Court in which application may be made
children.text: When under this chapter any application is required to be made to a court in which no proceeding has already been commenced with respect to the matter, such application may be made to any court which would otherwise have jurisdiction over the matter.
